name: State Bank Of Taunton
description_short: Community bank in Taunton, MN offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and credit cards since 1905.
description_long:
State Bank of Taunton is a locally-rooted community bank established in May 1905 with an initial capital stock of $10,000. Over 115+ years, it has grown substantially and remains committed to serving its regional communities. The bank celebrated its centennial in 2005 and has expanded its physical footprint with four major additions to its original building, with the most recent in 2011. In 2022, the bank opened a second branch location in Marshall, Minnesota, signaling continued growth and regional expansion.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products for both personal and business customers. Personal services include checking and savings accounts, personal loans, mobile banking, credit cards, and safety deposit boxes. For business and agricultural customers, State Bank of Taunton provides business checking and savings accounts, business loans, business credit cards, and safety deposit boxes. The bank also maintains lending resources including financial calculators and educational materials to help customers make informed financial decisions.

State Bank of Taunton distinguishes itself through its deep community roots and longevity. As an independent community bank rather than a national chain, it emphasizes personalized service and local decision-making. The bank's stable 115+ year operating history and continued reinvestment in physical infrastructure (most recent addition in 2011, new branch in 2022) demonstrate organizational stability and commitment to growth. The tagline "Helping Our Communities Thrive for More Than 115 Years" reflects its positioning as a community-focused institution.

State Bank of Taunton is best suited for customers in the Taunton and Marshall, Minnesota areas seeking traditional banking services from an established local institution. However, the bank's limited branch network (only two locations as of 2022) may constrain accessibility for customers outside its immediate geographic service area. No information is provided on deposit insurance (FDIC), loan rates, account fees, or digital banking capabilities beyond "mobile banking," making full service evaluation difficult for prospective customers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: 115+ years of operating history and financial stability since 1905
Dual branch locations in Taunton and Marshall, Minnesota as of 2022
Comprehensive account offerings including personal and business checking and savings
Mobile banking available for digital account access
Full-service lending for both personal and agricultural/business needs
Safety deposit box services for document and valuables storage
Extended drive-up hours (7:45 AM - 4:00 PM) accommodating working customers
Local decision-making and community-focused bank model
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only two branch locations in rural Minnesota
No online account opening or digital onboarding information provided
Minimal lobby hours (8:30 AM - 3:00 PM weekdays only) restrict in-person access
Website lacks transparency on account fees, interest rates, or loan terms
No mention of FDIC insurance, mobile app features, or digital service details
best_for: Residents of Taunton or Marshall, Minnesota seeking personal checking and savings accounts
Small businesses and agricultural operations in the bank's service area needing business financing
Customers who prefer local, community-focused banking relationships over national chains
diagnosis: State Bank of Taunton is best for customers in rural Minnesota (Taunton/Marshall areas) seeking traditional community banking with personal relationships and local decision-making. The main caveat is its limited geographic reach and minimal digital presence—customers outside its two-branch service area or those seeking comprehensive online banking capabilities should evaluate alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
